headline: How The Church & Dwight (CHD) Investment Story Is Shifting With New 2026 Expectations
summary: Our updated fair value estimate for Church & Dwight has shifted from US$95.84 to US$103.58, reflecting an around 8% change in the modelled worth of the shares. This move sits alongside Street research where bullish targets cluster around US$110 to US$112 and more cautious views sit nearer US$97, all framed around how credible the 2026 outlook and sector setup look today. As you read on, you will see how these different price targets fit into a broader story you can track over time. Analyst...
